subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! After making a complete journey throughout all the United States and the large cities of Europe, I have returned to the East
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست مهربان بعد از سیاحت تام در جمیع امریکا و شهرهای عظیم اروپا مراجعت
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @unity of governments; political unity, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology
